class.label: Instancia
class.name: INSTANCE

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.INSTANCE.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.INSTANCE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_INSTANCES.oi_instance) as CNT from WRK02_INSTANCES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_INSTANCES.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_INSTANCES.d_instance,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_INSTANCES.c_instance,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select wrk05_estructura.c_estructura from wrk05_estructura, wrk05_entidad_estr join wrk05_estructura.oi_estructura inner wrk05_entidad_estr.oi_estructura where wrk05_estructura.c_role={$PARAM/@c_rol} and wrk05_estructura.oi_organigrama={$PARAM/@oi_organigrama} and wrk05_entidad_estr.oi_entidad={$PARAM/@oi_entidad} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Valida si un usuario puede resolver un formulario. Retorna datos del formulario.
method.name: ResolveForm

qry:select.name: qryMainThread
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT t.oi_instance, t.oi_node, t.oi_thread, t.c_estado, t.c_asign_rol, t.d_asign_titulo, t.d_asign_etty, t.d_asign_ayn, t.c_organigrama, t.e_org_version,
n.d_param_1, f.oi_form, f.d_file_html, wf.l_automatica
FROM WRK02_THREADS as t, WRK01_NODES as n, WRK01_PROCESS as p, WRK01_FORMS as f, WRK01_WF as wf
JOIN t.oi_node INNER n.oi_node, n.oi_process INNER p.oi_process, n.d_param_1 INNER f.c_form, p.oi_wf INNER wf.oi_wf, f.oi_wf INNER wf.oi_wf
WHERE t.oi_thread = {$PARAM/@oi_thread} AND t.oi_node = {$PARAM/@oi_node}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryInstance
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT i.oi_instance, i.oi_wf, w.c_wf, w.d_wf, o.c_organigrama, o.e_version, o.e_version_pub
FROM WRK02_THREADS as t, WRK02_INSTANCES as i, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as o, WRK01_WF as w
JOIN t.oi_instance INNER i.oi_instance, i.oi_wf INNER w.oi_wf, w.oi_organigrama INNER o.oi_organigrama
WHERE t.oi_thread = {$PARAM/@oi_thread}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryUser
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT WRK02_USERS.oi_etty, WRK02_USERS.d_etty, WRK02_USERS.l_resolve, WRK02_USERS.f_resolve
FROM WRK02_USERS
WHERE WRK02_USERS.l_resolve = 1 and WRK02_USERS.oi_etty = {$PARAM/@oi_etty} and WRK02_USERS.oi_thread = {$PARAM/@oi_thread} and WRK02_USERS.f_resolve <= {Now()}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_NODE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select N.oi_node, N.oi_process, N.c_type, N.n_secuence, N.d_label, N.d_param_1, N.d_param_2, N.d_param_3, N.d_param_4, N.o_compformula, N.o_compprocess, N.n_horas from WRK01_NODES as N where N.oi_node={$PARAM/@oi_node} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_NODE_PARAM
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select P.oi_param, P.c_param, P.d_param, P.c_type, P.e_orden, P.e_subproceso, P.c_var, P.o_formula, P.o_compilada, P.d_valor from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS as P where P.oi_node={$PARAM/@oi_node} order by e_orden ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_PROCESS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select P.oi_process, P.oi_wf, P.c_process, P.e_automatico, P.d_process from WRK01_PROCESS as P, WRK01_NODES as N join P.oi_process inner N.oi_process where N.oi_node={$PARAM/@oi_node} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_PROCESS_2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select P.oi_process, P.oi_wf, P.c_process, P.e_automatico, P.d_process from WRK01_PROCESS as P where P.oi_wf={$PARAM/@oi_wf} and P.c_process={$PARAM/@c_process} and P.e_automatico={$PARAM/@e_automatico} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_PROCESS_NODE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select N.oi_node, N.oi_process, N.c_type, N.n_secuence, N.d_label, N.d_param_1, N.d_param_2, N.d_param_3, N.d_param_4, N.o_formula, N.o_compformula, N.n_horas from WRK01_NODES as N where N.oi_process={$PARAM/@oi_process} order by n_secuence ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Queries ejemplos de como se obtienen las instancias posibles de resolucion
resource.name: Queries_Ejemplo

method.description: Graba las variables de una instancia.
method.name: Save

method.description: Pasa un instancia (un thread) al nodo siguiente.
method.name: Pass

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select F.oi_file_wrk, F.o_imagen, F.e_tamanio, F.f_creacion from WRK02_DOCUMENTS as D, WRK03_FILES as F join D.oi_file_wrk inner F.oi_file_wrk where D.oi_instance={$SOURCE/@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_NODE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select N.oi_node, N.oi_process, N.c_type, N.n_secuence, N.d_label, N.d_param_1, N.d_param_2, N.d_param_3, N.d_param_4, N.o_compformula, N.o_compprocess, N.n_horas from WRK01_NODES as N where N.oi_node={$DATAIN/@oi_node} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATA TXT_FIND="" START="0" LEN="17" ORDERBY="DES" OI_PARENT="2006" WHERE="" />
resource.name: INFO_PERSONAS

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.INSTANCE.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.INSTANCE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(wrk05_entidad_estr.oi_entidad_estr) as CNT from wrk05_entidad_estr Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_INSTANCES.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_INSTANCES.d_instance,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_INSTANCES.c_instance,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_ENTIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select EN.oi_entidad from WRK01_WF as WF, WRK02_INSTANCES as INS, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_O, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_P, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E1, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E2, WRK05_ESTR_ESTR, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as EN where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and ORG_O.c_organigrama=ORG_P.c_organigrama and ORG_O.e_version_pub=ORG_P.e_version and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=E1.oi_organigrama and E1.oi_estructura=WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.oi_estructura and E2.c_estructura=WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.c_estructura and E1.oi_organigrama=E2.oi_organigrama and E2.oi_estructura=EN.oi_estructura and E1.c_estructura=INS.c_estructura and ORG_O.oi_organigrama=WF.oi_organigrama and INS.oi_instance={$PARAM/@oi_instance} and E2.c_role={$PARAM/@c_rol} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_NODE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select N.oi_node, N.oi_process, N.c_type, N.n_secuence, N.d_label, N.d_param_1, N.d_param_2, N.d_param_3, N.d_param_4, N.o_compformula, N.o_compprocess, N.n_horas from WRK01_NODES as N where N.oi_node={$DATAIN/@oi_node} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_NODE_ROLES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select P.oi_role_node, P.c_rol, P.c_notificar, P.c_resolver from WRK01_ROLES_NODE as P where P.oi_node={$PARAM/@oi_node} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_ENTIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select EN.oi_entidad, EN.d_entidad_estr from WRK01_WF as WF, WRK02_INSTANCES as INS, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_O, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_P, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E1, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E2, WRK05_ESTR_ESTR, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as EN where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and ORG_O.c_organigrama=ORG_P.c_organigrama and ORG_O.e_version_pub=ORG_P.e_version and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=E1.oi_organigrama and E1.oi_estructura=WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.oi_estructura and E2.c_estructura=WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.c_estructura and E1.oi_organigrama=E2.oi_organigrama and E2.oi_estructura=EN.oi_estructura and E1.c_estructura=INS.c_estructura and ORG_O.oi_organigrama=WF.oi_organigrama and INS.oi_instance={$DATAIN/@oi_instance} and E2.c_role={$PARAM/@c_rol} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_ENTIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select EN.oi_entidad, EN.d_entidad_estr from WRK01_WF as WF, WRK02_INSTANCES as INS, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_O, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_P, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E1, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as EN where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and ORG_O.oi_organigrama=WF.oi_organigrama and ORG_O.c_organigrama=ORG_P.c_organigrama and ORG_O.e_version_pub=ORG_P.e_version and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=E1.oi_organigrama and E1.oi_estructura=EN.oi_estructura and INS.oi_instance={$DATAIN/@oi_instance} and E1.c_estructura={$DATAIN/@c_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_ENTIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select EN.oi_entidad, EN.d_entidad_estr from WRK01_WF as WF, WRK02_INSTANCES as INS, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_O, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG_P, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E1, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as E2, WRK05_ESTR_ESTR, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as EN where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and ORG_O.c_organigrama=ORG_P.c_organigrama and ORG_O.e_version_pub=ORG_P.e_version and ORG_O.oi_organigrama=WF.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=E1.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=E2.oi_organigrama and E2.c_estructura=INS.c_estructura and E1.c_estructura=WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.c_estructura and E2.oi_estructura=WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.oi_estructura and
E1.oi_estructura=EN.oi_estructura and INS.oi_instance={$DATAIN/@oi_instance} and E1.c_role={$DATAIN/@c_rol} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_THREADS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_thread, T.oi_instance
from WRK02_THREADS as T where T.oi_inst_child={$PARAM/@oi_instance} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT WRK02_INSTANCES.oi_instance, WRK02_INSTANCES.c_estructura, WRK02_INSTANCES.d_owner, WRK02_THREADS.oi_thread FROM WRK02_INSTANCES, WRK01_WF, WRK02_THREADS JOIN WRK02_INSTANCES.oi_wf INNER WRK01_WF.oi_wf, WRK02_THREADS.oi_instance INNER WRK02_INSTANCES.oi_instance where WRK01_WF.oi_organigrama = {#SOURCE:@oi_organigrama} and WRK02_INSTANCES.c_estado_ej != \'F\' and WRK02_INSTANCES.c_estado_ej != \'E\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: buscar_org_actual
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.c_estructura from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR JOIN WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura INNER WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_estructura WHERE WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_organigrama = {#SOURCE:@oi_organigrama} and WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad = {#SOURCE:@d_owner}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: buscar_padres_actuales
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.c_estr_padre, ENTPADRE.oi_entidad as oi_entidad_padre, ENTPADRE.d_entidad_estr from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as ESTPADRE, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as ENTPADRE JOIN WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura INNER WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_estructura, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.c_estr_padre INNER ESTPADRE.c_estructura, ESTPADRE.oi_organigrama inner WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_organigrama, ESTPADRE.oi_estructura INNER ENTPADRE.oi_estructura WHERE WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_organigrama = {#SOURCE:@oi_organigrama} and WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad = {#SOURCE:@d_owner}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.VALUE.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.VALUE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_VALS.oi_value) as CNT from WRK02_VALS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_VALS.oi_value={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_VALS.c_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_VALS.oi_value,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_VALS.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.LOG.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.LOG.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_LOGS.oi_log) as CNT from WRK02_LOGS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_LOGS.oi_log={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_LOGS.o_comentario,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_LOGS.oi_log,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_LOGS.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.ETAPA.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.ETAPA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_ETAPA.oi_etapa) as CNT from WRK02_ETAPA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_ETAPA.oi_etapa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_ETAPA.d_entidad_ayn,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_ETAPA.d_entidad,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_ETAPA.oi_log={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.VALUE_CHILD.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.VALUE_CHILD.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_VALS_CHILD.oi_value_child) as CNT from WRK02_VALS_CHILD Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_VALS_CHILD.oi_value_child={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_VALS_CHILD.c_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_VALS_CHILD.oi_value_child,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_VALS_CHILD.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.VALUE_HIST.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.VALUE_HIST.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_VALS_HIST.oi_value_hist) as CNT from WRK02_VALS_HIST Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_VALS_HIST.oi_value_hist={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_VALS_HIST.c_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_VALS_HIST.oi_value_hist,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_VALS_HIST.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.REPORT.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.REPORT.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_REPORT.oi_report) as CNT from WRK02_REPORT Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_REPORT.oi_report={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_REPORT.oi_report,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_REPORT.oi_report,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_REPORT.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.DOCUMENT.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.DOCUMENT.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK02_DOCUMENTS.oi_document) as CNT from WRK02_DOCUMENTS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK02_DOCUMENTS.oi_document={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK02_DOCUMENTS.oi_document,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK02_DOCUMENTS.oi_document,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK02_DOCUMENTS.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.USER.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('{%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} SELECT WRK02_USERS.oi_user as ID, WRK02_USERS.oi_user as COD, WRK02_USERS.d_etty as DES FROM WRK02_USERS WHERE 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_THREAD='') {% %} {% and WRK02_USERS.oi_thread={#SOURCE:@OI_THREAD} and WRK02_USERS.c_rol=\'2\'%} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Instancias.PARAM.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT WRK02_PARAMS.oi_param as ID, WRK02_PARAMS.c_param as COD, WRK02_PARAMS.d_param as DES, WRK02_PARAMS.oi_instance as oi_instance, WRK02_PARAMS.c_param as c_param, WRK02_PARAMS.d_param as d_param, WRK02_PARAMS.c_type as c_type, WRK02_PARAMS.d_valor as d_valor FROM WRK02_PARAMS WHERE WRK02_PARAMS.oi_param in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
